title: Update PRD.md with implemented features status
description: Review all PRD gaps in prd.json and update PRD.md to accurately reflect implemented status. Mark features as implemented where code exists: grep -i, wc -l, touch existing file, ls pagination, find -type, rm -r safety, cd-to-file, mkdir error format, rm -r deep nesting. This directly closes the 75%→90% PRD match gap.
